grch38_core.display_name: GRCh38 core alignment and variant-calling bundle
grch38_core.source: User-provided local bundle, typically GATK resource bundle plus aligner indexes.
grch38_core.license_note: Genome FASTA and known-sites resources should be downloaded from their authoritative providers and tracked with checksums.
grch38_core.estimated_size: large; depends on FASTA, annotation, aligner indexes, and known-sites resources
suggested_setup: Record source URLs, release versions, and checksums in a project resource manifest before analysis runs.

grcm39_core.source: User-provided local FASTA, GTF, indexes, and blacklist resources.
grcm39_core.license_note: Use an annotation/source pair that matches the FASTA build.
grcm39_core.estimated_size: large; depends on FASTA, annotation, indexes, and optional known-sites resources
suggested_setup: Keep FASTA, GTF, blacklist, and index files from the same genome-build/release family.

reduced_micro_genome.source: Local synthetic or reduced-size test bundle.
reduced_micro_genome.license_note: Reduced references are for runner validation and should not be used for biological interpretation.
suggested_setup: Create genome.fa, genome.fa.fai, and annotation.gtf together so reduced coordinates remain internally consistent.
